fact_nuggets.text: Gooey (Japanese: Gooey) is an Ability introduced in Generation VI. Prior to Generation IX, it was the signature Ability of Goomy's evolutionary line.
Signature Ability of Goomy'S Evolutionary Line

Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , the Speed of the attacking Pokemon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Gooey has no effect outside of battle.

In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a move that makes contact , the Speed of the attacking Pokemon is decreased by one stage. If a Pokemon with this Ability is hit by a multistrike move that makes contact (such as Fury Swipes ), each hit activates this Ability.
Lowers attacking Pokemon's Speed by one stage on contact.
